name: giant-cipher-solver
description: CLI to search The Giant (BO3) ciphertext: heuristics + brute-force + English checks

scripts.solve:quick: cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=2 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=2 GIANT_MAX_MS=180000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:full: cross-env GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=4 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_MAX_MS=600000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:30m: cross-env GIANT_THREADS=24 GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_MAX_MS=1800000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:1h: cross-env GIANT_THREADS=24 GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_MAX_MS=3600000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:6h: cross-env GIANT_THREADS=24 GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_MAX_MS=21600000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:24h: cross-env GIANT_THREADS=24 GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_MAX_MS=86400000 npm run solve
scripts.solve:unlimited: cross-env GIANT_THREADS=24 GIANT_BRUTE_XOR_LEN=5 GIANT_BRUTE_VIG_LEN=3 GIANT_NESTED_B64=12 GIANT_LAYER_MAX_BUFS=400 GIANT_MAX_MS=0 npm run solve
